banner: 100% Free · 8 Phases · 105+ Resources · $0 Cost · Zero Paywalls
subtitle: A complete, self-paced path from Python fundamentals to production climate tech engineer — 8 phases, 105+ hand-curated free resources, IoT sensors, carbon accounting, energy modeling, cloud sustainability, and career prep. $0 cost. No paywalls. No compromises.

general.title: Environmental Data Explorer CLI
general.desc: Build a Python command-line tool that reads environmental CSV datasets, performs basic NumPy statistics, and outputs summary reports. Practice file I/O, error handling, and data type conversions across real-world climate files.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Parse and analyze grid load data
niches.title: Grid Load Data Parser
niches.desc: Write a Python script that ingests hourly electricity demand CSVs, computes daily peak loads and average consumption using NumPy, and exports summary statistics to JSON for downstream analysis.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Track supplier carbon inputs from raw data
niches.title: Supplier Emissions Data Reader
niches.desc: Build a Python script that reads supplier emissions spreadsheets, converts units, and computes per-supplier carbon totals. Practice Excel I/O, data cleaning, and aggregation with Pandas DataFrames.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.title: Sensor Data Ingestion Pipeline
niches.desc: Create a Python program that reads raw air quality sensor CSV exports, handles missing values, and computes daily averages for PM2.5 and CO2. Build a foundation for automated environmental monitoring workflows.

general.title: Climate Dataset Cleaning Workshop
general.desc: Take a messy real-world climate dataset with missing values, inconsistent formats, and duplicates. Use Pandas to read, clean, merge with a reference table, and produce a tidy analysis-ready CSV with documented transformations.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Clean and merge utility billing data
niches.title: Utility Data Wrangling Pipeline
niches.desc: Merge monthly utility billing exports from multiple sources into a single clean DataFrame. Handle date parsing, unit standardization, and missing meter readings to produce a unified energy consumption dataset.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Shipment-Emissions Reconciliation
niches.desc: Combine shipping manifests with transport emissions factors to calculate per-shipment carbon footprints. Practice filtering, joining on composite keys, and aggregating transport data by route and mode.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.title: Multi-Sensor Time Series Alignment
niches.desc: Load time-stamped readings from air, water, and soil sensors recorded at different intervals. Resample to a common frequency, interpolate gaps, and merge into a synchronized monitoring DataFrame for analysis.

general.title: Open-Source Climate Tool Contribution
general.desc: Fork an environmental open-source repository, create a feature branch, implement a small improvement or bugfix, and submit a pull request with a clear description and linked issue. Practice the full Git collaboration workflow.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Contribute to open energy data tools
niches.title: Open Energy Data Toolkit PR
niches.desc: Contribute a feature or documentation improvement to an open-source energy analysis tool such as PyPSA or pandapower. Fork the repo, implement your change on a branch, and submit a well-documented pull request.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Supply Chain Analysis Repo Setup
niches.desc: Initialize a Git repository for a supply chain carbon tracking project. Set up a .gitignore, create a branching strategy for feature development, write a README with setup instructions, and collaborate via pull requests.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Collaborate on a monitoring data repo
niches.title: Monitoring Dashboard Collaboration
niches.desc: Work in a team on a shared environmental monitoring repository. Create branches for new sensor integrations, review each other's pull requests, and maintain a clean main branch with passing CI checks.

general.title: Environmental Data Automation Scripts
general.desc: Build a set of shell scripts that automate common environmental data tasks: downloading datasets with curl, filtering with grep and awk, scheduling daily data pulls with cron, and managing remote sensor files via SSH.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Automate grid data collection via CLI
niches.title: Grid Data Fetch Cron Job
niches.desc: Write a shell script that uses curl to pull hourly grid load data from a public API, processes it with awk to extract key metrics, and schedules the script as a cron job for automated daily collection.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Shipment Log Batch Processor
niches.desc: Create a shell pipeline that finds all shipment CSV files in a directory, extracts columns for carrier, weight, and distance using awk, sorts and deduplicates the records, and writes a consolidated summary file.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: SSH into a remote sensor station
niches.title: Remote Sensor Station Manager
niches.desc: Use SSH to connect to a remote Raspberry Pi running environmental sensors. Write scripts to pull the latest readings, restart a hung sensor service, and set up a cron job that checks sensor health every hour.

general.title: Multi-Source Climate Data Aggregator
general.desc: Build a Python script that pulls temperature data from the NOAA API, air quality readings from the EPA API, and climate indicators from the World Bank. Merge all sources into a single DataFrame and generate a summary report.
skills: Data export to CSV and HTML

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Fetch real energy grid emissions data
niches.title: Grid Emissions Data Pipeline
niches.desc: Use the EPA eGRID API and EIA Open Data API to pull regional electricity emissions factors and generation mix data. Clean, transform, and store the results in a structured CSV for energy modeling use.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Pull transport emissions factors by region
niches.title: Transport Emissions Factor Loader
niches.desc: Query the IPCC and DEFRA emissions factor databases via their APIs or CSV downloads. Build a Python lookup tool that retrieves the correct emission factor for a given transport mode, fuel type, and region.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Aggregate global air quality station data
niches.title: Global Air Quality Aggregator
niches.desc: Connect to the OpenAQ API and EPA AirNow API to pull real-time PM2.5, O3, and NO2 readings from monitoring stations worldwide. Normalize the data into a common schema and compute regional averages.

general.title: Climate Data Statistical Explorer
general.desc: Perform hypothesis testing and regression analysis on NOAA climate datasets to identify significant temperature and precipitation trends across regions. Build a comprehensive statistical report with p-values, confidence intervals, and model diagnostics using Python.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Statistical analysis of grid reliability and renewable output variability
niches.title: Renewable Energy Output Statistical Analysis
niches.desc: Analyze wind and solar generation data to determine statistical significance of seasonal output variations and correlation between weather patterns and grid stability. Apply ANOVA to compare energy output across different turbine types and panel orientations.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Statistical modeling of supply chain carbon emissions
niches.title: Carbon Footprint Statistical Modeler
niches.desc: Build regression models to quantify the relationship between supply chain logistics decisions and carbon emissions across transportation modes. Use hypothesis testing to validate the effectiveness of green procurement policies using historical shipment data.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Statistical validation of environmental sensor data
niches.title: Sensor Data Statistical Validator
niches.desc: Apply ANOVA and t-tests to compare air quality readings across monitoring stations and validate measurement consistency. Develop regression models to identify significant pollutant sources and forecast threshold exceedance probabilities.

niches.desc: Design a cohesive set of visualizations showing emissions breakdowns by logistics tier, geographic origin heatmaps, and stacked area charts for emission source contributions over time. Apply consistent branding and accessibility standards to all outputs.

general.title: Interactive Environmental Data Dashboard

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.title: Live Grid Operations Dashboard
niches.desc: Develop a Dash application that visualizes real-time energy generation, consumption, and grid frequency data with interactive region selection and time-range controls. Include callback-driven drill-downs from national to regional to individual plant level.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Supply Chain Carbon Dashboard
niches.desc: Create a multi-page Dash application that tracks carbon emissions across the supply chain with interactive Sankey diagrams, supplier comparison tables, and temporal filtering. Implement drill-down callbacks from product-level to shipment-level granularity.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.title: Sensor Network Live Dashboard
niches.desc: Build a Dash application displaying real-time air and water quality readings from monitoring stations with map-based selection, threshold alerts, and historical trend overlays. Implement WebSocket callbacks for live sensor data streaming and anomaly highlighting.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Geospatial mapping of energy infrastructure and grid coverage
niches.title: Renewable Energy Site Mapper
niches.desc: Map renewable energy installations, grid transmission lines, and substation coverage using shapefiles with GeoPandas. Perform spatial joins to identify underserved areas and calculate proximity metrics between generation sites and population centers.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Geospatial visualization of supply chain logistics networks
niches.title: Logistics Network Geospatial Analyzer
niches.desc: Load supply chain facility locations, shipping routes, and warehouse networks into GeoPandas to perform spatial clustering and coverage analysis. Create interactive maps showing emissions hotspots and optimal routing corridors across geographic regions.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Geospatial environmental monitoring station network visualization
niches.title: Monitoring Network Coverage Mapper
niches.desc: Visualize environmental monitoring station locations, sensor coverage areas, and regional pollution levels on choropleth maps using GeoPandas. Perform spatial interpolation to estimate pollution levels in areas between sensors and identify monitoring gaps.

general.title: Environmental Time Series Forecaster
general.desc: Decompose and model time series data from environmental sensors using classical decomposition, ARIMA, and Prophet. Build anomaly detection pipelines to identify unusual patterns in temperature, air quality, and emissions data across multiple time scales.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Time series forecasting for energy demand and renewable output
niches.title: Energy Demand Forecast System
niches.desc: Build Prophet and ARIMA models to forecast hourly energy demand incorporating seasonality, holidays, and weather covariates. Implement anomaly detection to flag unusual consumption patterns and validate forecast accuracy against real grid data.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Time series analysis of supply chain emissions and shipment volumes
niches.title: Emissions Trend Forecaster
niches.desc: Apply time series decomposition to identify seasonal patterns in supply chain emissions and shipment volumes across product categories. Develop Prophet models to forecast future emissions trajectories and detect anomalous spikes indicating supply chain disruptions.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Time series anomaly detection for environmental sensor networks
niches.title: Sensor Anomaly Detection System
niches.desc: Deploy ARIMA and Prophet models to establish baseline patterns for air and water quality metrics, then detect anomalies in real-time sensor streams. Build a dashboard showing decomposed components, forecasted values, and flagged anomalies for environmental compliance monitoring.

niches.title: Renewable Energy Site Suitability Mapper
niches.desc: Create multi-layer suitability maps for wind and solar farm placement by combining land use, slope, proximity to grid infrastructure, and environmental constraint layers. Use raster calculator and weighted overlay to produce final suitability scores.

niches.title: Green Supply Chain Corridor Optimizer
niches.desc: Map existing transportation networks and overlay them with emission zone restrictions and EV charging infrastructure to identify optimal green logistics corridors. Perform network analysis to calculate shortest paths avoiding high-emission zones.

niches.title: Watershed Delineation and Land Cover Baseline
niches.desc: Delineate watershed boundaries using DEM hydrology tools and classify land cover within each sub-basin using supervised classification of aerial imagery. Calculate per-watershed statistics for impervious surface coverage and vegetation density.

general.desc: Download and process Landsat 8/9 and Sentinel-2 imagery across multiple dates to detect land cover changes over a decade. Compute spectral indices like NDVI and NDWI, then apply change detection algorithms to identify areas of urbanization, deforestation, and wetland loss.

niches.tagline: Assess solar potential from satellite-derived irradiance
niches.title: Solar Irradiance Mapping from Sentinel-2
niches.desc: Process Sentinel-2 cloud-free composites to estimate surface solar irradiance using clear-sky models and aerosol optical depth retrievals. Map rooftop solar potential across urban areas by combining irradiance data with building footprint datasets.

niches.name: Supply Chain

niches.title: Agricultural Supply Source Health Monitor
niches.desc: Use Sentinel-2 NDVI time series to monitor crop health across key agricultural sourcing regions for food and biofuel supply chains. Classify crop types using multi-temporal spectral signatures and detect anomalies indicating drought or disease.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: Track vegetation health and deforestation events
niches.title: Deforestation Early Warning System
niches.desc: Process Landsat time series to compute forest canopy loss alerts using breakpoint detection algorithms. Validate alerts against known fire events and illegal logging reports. Generate near-real-time deforestation alerts with confidence scores.

general.title: Environmental ML Lifecycle Platform
general.desc: Build an MLOps platform using MLflow that manages the full lifecycle of environmental prediction models from experiment tracking to production deployment. Include automated retraining pipelines, drift detection, and model registry with promotion gates.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.title: Grid Carbon Forecast MLOps Pipeline
niches.desc: Deploy an MLflow-managed model that forecasts next-hour grid carbon intensity from weather and demand data. Implement Evidently-based drift detection, automated retraining triggers, and A/B deployment with canary rollouts.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Supply Chain Emissions Predictor MLOps
niches.desc: Build an end-to-end MLOps pipeline for a model that predicts supply chain emissions from shipment attributes. Use MLflow for experiment tracking, implement data and concept drift monitoring, and serve predictions via a versioned API.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.title: Air Quality Prediction MLOps Stack
niches.desc: Create an MLOps workflow for an air quality prediction model that ingests sensor feeds, retrains weekly, and deploys with automated quality gates. Track model performance metrics in MLflow and alert on prediction drift via Grafana.

general.title: Sustainability Tech Capstone Portfolio
general.desc: Build 2-3 end-to-end capstone projects demonstrating full-stack sustainability applications. Each project includes planning documentation, CI/CD pipelines, comprehensive tests, and deployment to production.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.title: Smart Grid Analytics Platform Capstone
niches.desc: Design and build a comprehensive energy analytics platform featuring real-time grid monitoring, predictive maintenance, and consumption forecasting. Include open-source contributions to existing energy monitoring tools.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.title: Supply Chain Transparency Tracker Capstone
niches.desc: Develop an end-to-end supply chain visibility platform tracking materials from origin to consumer with blockchain verification. Contribute to open-source supply chain tools and document the full development lifecycle.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.title: Environmental Monitoring Hub Capstone
niches.desc: Create a unified environmental monitoring platform aggregating air quality, water quality, and biodiversity data with ML-powered analysis. Include contributions to open-source environmental datasets.

general.title: Certification Portfolio & Study System

niches.title: Energy Certification Mastery Portfolio
niches.desc: Pursue and document preparation for energy-specific certifications including GBEA, CEM, and LEED Green Associate. Build a study guide repository with practice questions, flashcards, and real-world application examples.

niches.name: Supply Chain

niches.desc: Complete and document certification journeys for CSCP, CPIM, and CSCMP credentials with sustainability focus. Create a certification comparison matrix and build practice tools including scenario-based assessments.

niches.desc: Prepare for environmental certifications including CIH, QEP, and AWS Sustainability Specialty with comprehensive study materials. Develop practice tools with sample datasets, analysis templates, and portfolio examples.

socialMediaGuide.milestonePost: Completed Phase 08: Portfolio, Certification & Career Prep!
whatToPost: Talk about your green tech career journey

general.title: Carbon Footprint Tracker SaaS
general.desc: A full-stack SaaS application that calculates personal and organizational carbon footprints. Users log activities (transport, energy, food, purchases), the system applies GHG Protocol emission factors, stores data in PostgreSQL, and generates interactive dashboards with reduction recommendations. Includes Scope 1/2/3 breakdown, benchmarking, and exportable sustainability reports.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Microgrid optimization, smart grid analytics, renewable forecasting
niches.title: Renewable Energy Microgrid Optimizer
niches.desc: A platform that models hybrid renewable energy microgrids (solar, wind, battery storage) using HOMER and SAM data. Users input location and load profiles, the system runs optimization to find the lowest LCOE configuration, and provides real-time monitoring of grid performance with weather-adjusted forecasting.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Supply chain emissions tracking, Scope 3 accounting, supplier engagement
niches.title: Supply Chain Carbon Auditor
niches.desc: An enterprise tool for tracking and reducing Scope 3 supply chain emissions. Integrates with procurement systems, calculates product-level carbon footprints using Ecoinvent data, identifies high-emission suppliers, and generates decarbonization roadmaps with ROI projections for reduction strategies.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: IoT sensor networks, air/water quality, real-time environmental alerts
niches.title: Environmental Sensor Network Platform
niches.desc: A distributed IoT platform that collects air and water quality data from citizen-deployed sensors. Features real-time monitoring dashboards, anomaly detection, pollution source identification, automated alerts, and open data APIs for researchers and policymakers.
